---
title: Costs and Getting Access
---

## How to request access
Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam has a campus licence for PhD candidates only. The iThenticate key users within the faculties are the first point of contact for creating accounts for PhD candidates. To request an iThenticate account, you can contact your faculty's [Key User](/tools/ithenticate/key-users.qmd). The Key User can create a ticket in the [VU Service Portal](https://services.vu.nl/esc?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=b1a32e6797c6a910e553359fe153afd5) to request an account.

A list of Key Users per faculty can be found on [this overview](/tools/ithenticate/key-users.qmd).

## Costs
There are no direct costs involved.
